title: yatsath #3341
definition:
1) to kindle, burn, set on fire
    1a) (Qal) to kindle
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be kindled
        1b2) to be left desolate
    1c) (Hiphil) to set on fire, kindle
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to kindle, burn, set on fire
    1a) (Qal) to kindle
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be kindled
        1b2) to be left desolate
    1c) (Hiphil) to set on fire, kindle

    NASB:  to kindle, burn
